poll.question: Marcus brought you into his tide pools. You're staying. Tomorrow, do you talk about what it means—name the shift, make sure everyone's okay—or keep the magic alive by not

options.label: Talk about it
options.desc: Words make this real. You've trusted so far by being honest—keep going

options.label: Keep the magic
options.desc: Don't name it. Just stay close and let the moment breathe

options.label: Follow Marcus's lead
options.desc: He opened his sacred place. Ask him what he needs—silence or truth

in_play.label: Just Ryan
in_play.desc: Marcus treasures the private bond he found with Ryan
